action.close.developer_comment: Used for the button to close a message dialog

action.try_again.developer_comment: Used for the button to try the action again

preview_modal.title.developer_comment: The title for the preview submission success dialog

preview_modal.body.string: The data you entered is valid, but it was not submitted because this is a Form preview.
preview_modal.body.developer_comment: The body message for the preview submission success dialog

submission_modal.title.developer_comment: The title for the submission success dialog

submission_modal.body.string: You can fill this Form out again or close if you’re done.
submission_modal.body.developer_comment: The body message for the submission success dialog

submission_modal.action.fill_out_again.developer_comment: Used for the button the user clicks to fill in this form again

thank_you_modal.title.developer_comment: The title for the public submission success dialog

thank_you_modal.body.string: You can close this window now.
thank_you_modal.body.developer_comment: The body message for the public submission success dialog

edit_submission_modal.title.developer_comment: The title for the edit submission success dialog

edit_submission_modal.body.developer_comment: The body message for the edit submission success dialog

error_modal.title.developer_comment: The title for the dialog shown when there is an error submitting the form

error_modal.body.string: Your data was not submitted. Error message: {errorMessage} You can close this dialog and try again. If the error keeps happening, please contact the person who asked you to fill this Form or {supportEmail}.
error_modal.body.developer_comment: The body message for the error during submission. {errorMessage} and {supportEmail} should not be translated.

sending_data_modal.title.developer_comment: The title for the dialog shown during form submission

sending_data_modal.body.string: Your data is being submitted. Please don’t close this window until it’s finished.
sending_data_modal.body.developer_comment: The body message for the dialog shown during form submission

session_timeout_modal.title.developer_comment: The title for the dialog shown when the user needs to log in again to successfully submit this form

session_timeout_modal.body.full.string: Please log in {here} in a different browser tab and try again.
session_timeout_modal.body.full.developer_comment: The body message for the dialog shown when the user needs to log in again to successfully submit this form. {here} should not be translated.

session_timeout_modal.body.here.developer_comment: The text shown in the link to the login page

retry_modal.title.developer_comment: The title for the dialog shown when there was an unspecified error during submission

retry_modal.body.string: Your data was not fully submitted. Please press the “Try again” button to retry. If the error keeps happening, please contact the person who asked you to fill this Form or {supportEmail}.
retry_modal.body.developer_comment: The body message for the dialog shown when there was an unspecified error during submission. {supportEmail} should not be translated

request.problem.no_response.string: Something went wrong: there was no response to your request.
request.problem.no_response.developer_comment: Error message for when the server fails to respond to the submission

request.problem.404_1.string: The resource you are looking for cannot be found. The resource may have been deleted
request.problem.404_1.developer_comment: Error message for when the specific form can't be found on the server

request.problem.entity_too_large.string: The data that you are trying to upload is too large.
request.problem.entity_too_large.developer_comment: Error message for when the user is trying to upload too much data
